hero.badge: AI translation · Human review · Full audit trail
hero.description: Jendee AI combines Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini to translate your content in seconds, then routes it to qualified human reviewers for final sign-off — all in one auditable workflow.

mockPreview.caption: Jendee AI review editor — approve, reject, or revise in one click

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Drop a JSON, CSV, Markdown, XLIFF, or PDF file. Jendee AI parses it and extracts every translatable string automatically.
howItWorks.step2Body: Choose Claude, GPT-4o, DeepSeek, or Gemini. Get a cost estimate per language before committing. Translation runs in parallel across all targets.
howItWorks.step3Body: Reviewers see source and target side-by-side, edit in-place, approve or reject with one click. Every action is logged in the audit trail.

features.heading: Built for translation teams
features.multiModelBody: Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, DeepSeek — pick the best model for each language pair.
features.costTransparencyBody: See language cost breakdown before every job. No surprise bills.
features.pdfSupportBody: Scanned PDFs are automatically processed with Claude Vision. No manual extraction needed.
features.auditTrailBody: Every approval, rejection, and edit is timestamped and attributed to a reviewer.
features.languagesBody: Presets for EMEA, LATAM, APAC, and All English variants. Search by region or BCP-47 code.
features.accessControlBody: Admins, requesters, and reviewers each see only what they need. Enterprise SSO available.

pricing.heading: Pay as you go
pricing.subheading: No subscription. No seat fees. Pay only for what you translate.
pricing.included2: All AI models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, DeepSeek)

estimator.title: Cost estimator
estimator.subtitle: Estimate your translation cost before signing up
estimator.disclaimer: Estimate only. Final cost depends on actual content length and model output.

cta.heading: Ready to ship better translations?
cta.body: Join teams that trust Jendee AI to get accurate translations reviewed and approved faster.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.contact: Contact your admin to create an account

vision.badge: The five pillars of next-generation translation
vision.description: Most translation tools bolt AI onto an existing workflow. We built the workflow around what AI makes possible. Here are the five shifts that define it.
vision.ctaHeading: Ready to build on these pillars?
vision.ctaBody: Jendee AI is the platform where these ideas run in production today. Start with AI translation, human review, and a full audit trail — free.
vision.p1Point1: Understands why a string exists — UI label, legal disclaimer, or marketing copy — not just what it says
vision.p1Point2: Infers context from surrounding strings, file structure, screenshots, and product metadata
vision.p1Point3: Replaces static TM with a living semantic context graph that gets smarter per project
vision.p1To: "do I understand what this means here?"
vision.p2Subtitle: Describe your goal. The system figures it out.
vision.p2Point1: Auto-detects content type — UI string, doc, marketing, legal — and routes accordingly
vision.p2Point2: Self-configures quality thresholds, MT engine selection, and review triggers
vision.p2Point3: Agents monitor repos and CMS and act without human pipeline management
vision.p2To: "describe your goal, the system figures it out"
vision.p3Point1: Learns brand voice, tone, and terminology from approved translations automatically
vision.p3Point2: Scores quality against your standards — not industry averages or MQM checklists
vision.p3Point3: Flags cultural misfires, not just grammar errors
vision.p3Point4: Generates explainable quality scores: why it was flagged, not just a number
vision.p3To: "does it sound like us, in that market?"
vision.p4Point1: Predicts which segments actually need human review using confidence scoring
vision.p4Point2: Routes only ambiguous, high-risk, or brand-critical content to linguists
vision.p4Point3: Gives reviewers AI-generated context, alternatives, and reasoning — not a blank CAT editor
vision.p4Point4: Tracks linguist corrections and feeds them back into the model
vision.p4To: "humans review what matters, AI explains why"
vision.p5Point1: API-first and SDK-first — translation as a function call, not a platform login
vision.p5Point2: Native to GitHub Actions, Figma plugins, Contentful webhooks, and CI/CD pipelines
vision.p5Point3: Headless TMS mode — all logic accessible programmatically, no UI required for power users
vision.p5Point4: Supports XLIFF, JSON, PO, ARB, and Android XML with round-trip fidelity
vision.p5To: "translation is embedded in your existing tools"
